sentences.arabic: بَحَثَتْ مَرْيَمُ عَنْهَا فِي كُلِّ غُرْفَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Maryam je tražila mačku u svakoj sobi.
sentences.translationEn: Maryam looked for it in every room.

sentences.translation: Zvala je mačku glasno s vrata.
sentences.translationEn: She called it loudly from the door.

sentences.translation: Nakon sat vremena mačka se sama vratila.
sentences.translationEn: After an hour the cat came back on its own.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْقِطَّةُ تَحْمِلُ شَيْئًا صَغِيرًا فِي فَمِهَا.
sentences.translation: Mačka je nosila nešto malo u ustima.
sentences.translationEn: The cat was carrying something small in its mouth.
